title: DLSS Preset Manifest
description: Maps render presets to DLSS DLL versions for Super Resolution (SR), Frame Generation (FG), or Ray Reconstruction (RR). Loaded by RenderPilot at runtime from GitHub Pages.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Bumped when structure changes incompatibly.

library_family.description: DLL family this manifest applies to.

dll_kind.description: Short tag matching the DlssDllKind enum in Rust (sr=Super Resolution, fg=Frame Generation, rr=Ray Reconstruction).

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this manifest was last regenerated.

presets.description: Master preset table. Keys are preset DWORD values as decimal strings.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the UI.

deprecated.description: If true, this preset exists in the driver but is no longer recommended.

version_support.description: Ordered list of (DLL version, supported presets) entries. For a DLL version V, the largest entry with version <= V applies (semver compare).

version.description: DLL version in 'a.b.c.d' form (1-4 numeric segments).

supported_presets.description: Preset DWORD values supported for DLL versions >= this entry (until the next entry overrides them). Must reference keys present in the 'presets' map.

notes.description: Free-form maintainer notes for human readers.
